author: SantiMod
content:
The Atlas Brew #14 is confirmed! Join us this Wednesday at 1900 UTC! 

The Atlas Brew is a Star Atlas Community Event. Made by the community, for the community   

It happens every Wednesday in the Voice Chat channel  

This week's main topic: SCREAM! We have a lot of information to digest after Friday’s Town Hall BIG alpha drop! Come join us on this Brew to start planning and theorycrafting all together about SCREAM 
See you all on Wednesday at 19:00 UTC!

Join 10 minutes earlier to participate in the Quiz! Winner gets one ship!

https://discord.com/events/789226204980707409/975789711106908230
